description_long: This necklace features a striking yellow and black patterned fabric or beaded band, reminiscent of animal print, that wraps around the neck. The band transitions into a series of round, light-colored beads at the front, culminating in a central, circular pendant with intricate detailing. The necklace appears to be lightweight and flexible, designed to rest comfortably on the collarbone. The clasp and connecting elements are not visible from the front, suggesting a seamless or hidden closure. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, suitable for making a statement in urban fashion. The color palette and motif evoke a sense of wildness and energy, making it a standout accessory.
description: A bold yellow and black animal print necklace with a central beaded pendant and light-colored accent beads. The design is striking and energetic, perfect for urban fashion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with its yellow and black patterned band, light beads, and central pendant.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness and curvature of the band, with the pattern continuing around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the necklace, showing the band and beads without the central pendant visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, displaying the band’s pattern and how it sits on the neck.
